summary: Frontend testing of payment type tabs and QR code visibility fixes in UnifiedSalesPage checkout dialog. All 5 payment tabs (Cash, Digital, Split, Partial, Credit) are clickable without disabled attribute. Warning messages appear correctly for Partial/Credit without customer. QR code in receipt upload dialog is now always visible (verified in code - <details> replaced with always-visible <div>).

bugs_verified_as_fixed.bug: Split, Partial, Credit payment tabs were disabled
bugs_verified_as_fixed.fix_verified: All 5 tabs (Cash, Digital, Split, Partial, Credit) are now clickable - disabled attribute is None for all tabs

bugs_verified_as_fixed.bug: QR code hidden behind toggle in receipt upload dialog
bugs_verified_as_fixed.fix_verified: Code confirms QR section uses always-visible <div> with comment 'QR option — always visible alongside direct upload' (lines 2443-2463)

critical_code_review_comments: React duplicate key warnings in console: 'retail', 'wholesale', 'special' keys used multiple times - should add unique index to keys
HTML structure warnings: <span> cannot be child of <option> and <select> - hydration errors
context_for_next_testing_agent: Payment tab bug verified fixed. All 5 payment types (Cash, Digital, Split, Partial, Credit) are clickable in checkout dialog at /sales-new. Warning messages show correctly when no customer selected for Partial/Credit. QR code visibility fix verified in code - the <details> toggle was replaced with always-visible <div>. To fully test QR visibility, complete a digital sale and verify the receipt upload dialog shows QR alongside direct upload button.

features_tested.test_method: Playwright automation - clicked each tab and checked disabled attribute
Playwright automation - verified warning text visible

results.warning_text: Select a customer first — partial/credit balance goes to Accounts Receivable

features_tested.feature: QR Code Visibility in Receipt Upload

results.comment_in_code: QR option — always visible alongside direct upload
